SCP 0.1.2.9004
  • Reference

    Run multi-dimensional scaling(MDS)

    RunMDS.Rd

    Run a MDS dimensionality reduction.

    RunMDS(object, ...)

# S3 method for default
RunMDS(
  object,
  assay = NULL,
  slot = "scale.data",
  nmds = 50,
  dist.method = "cosine",
  mds.method = "cmdscale",
  rev.mds = FALSE,
  ndims.print = 1:5,
  nfeatures.print = 30,
  reduction.key = "MDS_",
  seed.use = 42,
  verbose = TRUE,
  ...
)

# S3 method for Assay
RunMDS(
  object,
  assay = NULL,
  slot = "scale.data",
  features = NULL,
  nmds = 50,
  dist.method = "cosine",
  mds.method = "cmdscale",
  rev.mds = FALSE,
  verbose = TRUE,
  ndims.print = 1:5,
  nfeatures.print = 30,
  reduction.key = "MDS_",
  seed.use = 42,
  ...
)

# S3 method for Seurat
RunMDS(
  object,
  assay = NULL,
  slot = "scale.data",
  features = NULL,
  nmds = 50,
  dist.method = "cosine",
  mds.method = "cmdscale",
  rev.mds = FALSE,
  verbose = TRUE,
  ndims.print = 1:5,
  nfeatures.print = 30,
  reduction.name = "mds",
  reduction.key = "MDS_",
  seed.use = 42,
  ...
)

    Arguments

    object

    An object

    assay

    Name of Assay mds is being run on.

    slot

    Name of slot mds is being run on.

    nmds

    Total Number of MDS to compute and store (50 by default).

    rev.mds

    By default computes the mds on the cell x gene matrix. Setting to true will compute it on gene x cell matrix.

    ndims.print

    MDS to print genes for.

    nfeatures.print

    Number of genes to print for each MDS.

    reduction.key

    dimensional reduction key, specifies the string before the number for the dimension names. "MDS_" by default.

    seed.use

    Set a random seed. By default, sets the seed to 42. Setting NULL will not set a seed.

    verbose

    Print the top genes associated with high/low loadings for the MDS.

    features

    Features to compute mds on. If features=NULL, mds will be run using the variable features for the Assay.

    reduction.name

    dimensional reduction name, 'mds' by default

    Value

    Returns Seurat object with the MDS calculation stored in the reductions slot.

    Contents

    Developed by Hao Zhang.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.0.4.
